items.name: Tactical Heavy Armor Vest
items.description:
More recolor in the group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/50422001/Osu-Corp#!/about

other matching piece: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/140077174138947/Tactical-Heavy-Armor-Vest-accessories
The D1-VANGUARD division would like to introduce you to the ultimate in "not-dying-today" technology. This Heavy Armor Vest is designed for the operative who considers a "tactical retreat" to be a personal insult. Constructed from enough high-density ballistic plating to stop a small moon, this vest ensures you stay upright even when the gloomy atmosphere of the warzone is filled with more lead than air. It’s heavy, it’s intimidating, and it’s the only thing standing between you and a very uncomfortable conversation with the afterlife. Remember: At OSU Corp, your survival is a key metric in our quarterly success. Try not to scratch the paint.
